data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for calendar synchronization with Google/Outlook. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the functionality of this feature. The linked use case mentions the need for calendar sync, but without any supporting evidence from prior steps or specific API interactions demonstrating this capability, the requirement remains unfulfilled.
gaps: No evidence confirming that the system supports calendar synchronization with Google/Outlook.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
